svg.title: BCI adaptive motor-imagery pipeline — end-to-end architecture
svg.desc: Five-stage pipeline: data ingestion, quality gating, per-subject calibration, longitudinal drift tracking, and DevOps serving infrastructure.

g.text: Plateau met (patience = 2) or pool exhausted at n = 84
CSP transform → LDA predict → TrialResult(y_pred, confidence, margin, reject_reasons)
High confidence + high r̂ → low assistance · Degraded signal → high assistance
